'''Kalarba City''' was the primary city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. On the other side of a mountain chain were the [[Great Sea (Kalarba)|Great Sea]] and the [[Three Peaks of Tharen]].

The city, along with Kalarba, was [[Battle of Kalarba|destroyed]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] pulled [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]] onto the planet using a [[dovin basal]].

{{City-stub}}
